title: Supervisor
description:
Responsibilities:

  • To assist and support Project Executive in planning and controlling all project-base assignments.
  • To liaise and coordinate with internal and external parties to ensure smooth implementation of projects.
  • Responsible for project management of new and existing projects, liaison with customers on their specifications and schedules. To ensure that the company meets all customers’ requirements.
  • To compile and assist in the evaluation of project reports with sales/project team.
  • Co-ordinate with operations department on waste collection and proper documentation.
  • To manage the workers at project work site and inform project executive if there is any issue regarding to the workers or the work.
  • To train workers on specific skillset in order to fulfil the project needs, Eg. Hacking/Removal of rook sheets using boomlift.
  • To oversee the site safety and personal safety of respective project sites. Eg. Working conditions/working surroundings/personal protection equipment.

Plant Maintenance

  • To perform repair and fabrication of task in the plant as per requirement.
  • Flow and fill instruction given by section, operation, maintenance technician and supervisor.
  • Perform routine check on the plant equipment as and when required by technician/supervisor.
  • Report to supervisor or technician any abnormal equipment in plant.
  • Perform pipe line and structural fabrication as per instruction by technician and supervisor.
  • Strictly follow permit to work system to carry out maintenance work in plant.
  • Maintain proper housekeeping after completion of maintenance on equipment in plant.
  • To comply all the EHS Environment Health Safety rules and regulation in plant.
  • Update daily log book on regular basis on the maintenance actives performed.

postedCompany.description:
ECO Special Waste Management is one of Singapore's leading waste management companies. We provide a range of high quality, reliable services exclusively to our industrial and commercial customers from industries such as petrochemical, pharmaceutical, oil and gas, power generation, electronics, marine, engineering, and semiconductor.

ECO is fully licensed by the National Environment Agency (NEA) as a Toxic Industrial Waste Collector, a General Waste Collector, and an Asbestos Removal Contractor, among other qualifications. As part of our commitment to environmental protection, proactive health and safety management, and sustainable development, we are certified to ISO14001 Environmental Management System, OHSAS 18001, and Biz Safe Star Level.

ECO operates out of a single, integrated Special Waste Management Centre comprised of nine main treatment and recovery facilities on a 7 hectare plot of land at 21/23 Tuas View Circuit, Singapore. We have a fleet of more than 30 waste collection vehicles and over 200 ISO tankers, open top containers, compactors, vacuum tankers, and other systems to ensure customer waste is collected promptly and safely. We have more than 200 dedicated staff, working to provide tailored, effective solutions for customers everyday.
postedCompany.name: ECO SPECIAL WASTE MANAGEMENT PTE LTD
